creator: dgilbert@interlog.com
text: I have changed sg_pt_freebsd.c to accept the abridged device name form that was broken by the addition of the stat(2) system call that appeared in version 1.43 . The fix is in svn rev 877 and can be found at https://github.com/doug-gilbert/sg3_utils/tree/master/trunk . Version 1.46 will be released soon and will include this fix.
